name: kerno
description: Evidence-backed context capsules and observable phase routing for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Right context. Right model. Every task.
interface.longDescription: Kerno builds bounded, evidence-backed repository context capsules, expands them from test evidence, and returns structured provenance, routing truth, onboarding, and settings state without pretending a plugin can silently switch its parent model.
defaultPrompt: Open Kerno and show my verified local context state.
Explain why each item is in Kerno's current context capsule.
Route this task by phase and label recommendation versus execution.
